title: Package, CLI, API, Configuration, Async Lifecycle, and Deployment · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in installable operable Python agent service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Separate domain policy, provider adapter, orchestration, tools, persistence, interfaces, and composition root in an import-safe typed package.
Expose consistent request, event, terminal, error, cancellation, idempotency, and version behavior through accessible CLI and authenticated API surfaces.
Validate environment-specific non-secret configuration, inject secret references separately, reject unsafe defaults, and publish a redacted effective config.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

debug case — A debug agent engineering team handles case 2826 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

Which observation would disprove this suspected cause: “A deployment timestamp is sufficient agent release identity.”?

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Deployment Identity · fault isolation · Debug Deployment Identity.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Deployment Identity
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-deployment-identity-nlld21" that uses case 8714 to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Deployment Identity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Deployment Identity into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Deployment Identity, keep Deployment Identity connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-deployment-identity-nlld21
# Competency: agentpy-deployment-identity.
# Case 8714: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_deployment_identity_nlld21(target_environments: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, lifecycle_smokes: int = 12, healthy_shutdowns: int = 12, leaked_credentials: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_nlld21 = "nlld21-12dlln-8714"
    assert evidence_variant_nlld21
    evidence_axes_nlld21 = (
        "authoritynlld21",
        "interaction8714",
        "tool12dlln",
        "statenlld218714",
        "evaluation8714nlld21",
        "recovery12dlln8714",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_nlld21)) == 6
    if target_environments < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_environments:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if lifecycle_smokes < 3 or healthy_shutdowns != lifecycle_smokes:
        return False, healthy_shutdowns, "lifecycle-gap"
    if leaked_credentials > 0:
        return False, leaked_credentials, "deployment-secret-leak"
    assert clean_installs == target_environments and healthy_shutdowns == lifecycle_smokes
    return True, healthy_shutdowns, "operable-agent-service"
